## Meeting Purpose

[Working session to improve content creation process for Prophecy using Atlas AI tool](https://fathom.video/share/uhQ45cf8hr_JN_veN8NGAi72WvG4B6x1?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus on creating strong outlines before using Atlas to generate content](https://fathom.video/share/uhQ45cf8hr_JN_veN8NGAi72WvG4B6x1?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Edit and condense Atlas outputs rather than rewriting from scratch](https://fathom.video/share/uhQ45cf8hr_JN_veN8NGAi72WvG4B6x1?tab=summary&timestamp=2429.0)
  - [Balance between maintaining quality standards and leveraging AI efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/uhQ45cf8hr_JN_veN8NGAi72WvG4B6x1?tab=summary&timestamp=3105.0)
  - [Experiment with different input methods to get better results from Atlas](https://fathom.video/share/uhQ45cf8hr_JN_veN8NGAi72WvG4B6x1?tab=summary&timestamp=1959.0)

## Topics

### Atlas AI Tool Challenges

  - [Outputs tend to be overly long and repetitive](https://fathom.video/share/uhQ45cf8hr_JN_veN8NGAi72WvG4B6x1?tab=summary&timestamp=2299.0)
  - [Often includes unnecessary sections like "best practices" and "pitfalls"](https://fathom.video/share/uhQ45cf8hr_JN_veN8NGAi72WvG4B6x1?tab=summary&timestamp=2498.0)
  - [Struggles with thought leadership content that requires original ideas](https://fathom.video/share/uhQ45cf8hr_JN_veN8NGAi72WvG4B6x1?tab=summary&timestamp=2810.0)
  - [Internal linking feature can shoehorn in irrelevant information](https://fathom.video/share/uhQ45cf8hr_JN_veN8NGAi72WvG4B6x1?tab=summary&timestamp=2516.0)

### Content Creation Strategy

  - [Create outline externally (e.g. ChatGPT) before inputting to Atlas](https://fathom.video/share/uhQ45cf8hr_JN_veN8NGAi72WvG4B6x1?tab=summary&timestamp=1465.0)
  - [Reinforce desired outline at multiple stages of Atlas process](https://fathom.video/share/uhQ45cf8hr_JN_veN8NGAi72WvG4B6x1?tab=summary&timestamp=1959.0)
  - [Focus on editing/condensing Atlas output rather than rewriting](https://fathom.video/share/uhQ45cf8hr_JN_veN8NGAi72WvG4B6x1?tab=summary&timestamp=2429.0)
  - [Aim for \~2500 words, deleting entire sections if needed](https://fathom.video/share/uhQ45cf8hr_JN_veN8NGAi72WvG4B6x1?tab=summary&timestamp=2897.0)
  - [Use "Ask AI" tool within Atlas to help with editing](https://fathom.video/share/uhQ45cf8hr_JN_veN8NGAi72WvG4B6x1?tab=summary&timestamp=2466.0)

### Quality vs Efficiency Balance

  - [Previous manual articles set high quality bar, may see dip with AI](https://fathom.video/share/uhQ45cf8hr_JN_veN8NGAi72WvG4B6x1?tab=summary&timestamp=3549.0)
  - [Goal is to produce acceptable quality more efficiently, not perfection](https://fathom.video/share/uhQ45cf8hr_JN_veN8NGAi72WvG4B6x1?tab=summary&timestamp=3113.0)
  - [Think of role as editor managing AI "writer", not manual writer](https://fathom.video/share/uhQ45cf8hr_JN_veN8NGAi72WvG4B6x1?tab=summary&timestamp=3525.0)
  - [Create tickets for Atlas improvements when output is unsatisfactory](https://fathom.video/share/uhQ45cf8hr_JN_veN8NGAi72WvG4B6x1?tab=summary&timestamp=3634.0)

### Client Feedback

  - [Cody (client) has approved many proposed topics](https://fathom.video/share/uhQ45cf8hr_JN_veN8NGAi72WvG4B6x1?tab=summary&timestamp=3804.0)
  - [Added notes on some to avoid straying off-topic](https://fathom.video/share/uhQ45cf8hr_JN_veN8NGAi72WvG4B6x1?tab=summary&timestamp=3776.0)
  - [Many approved topics are "thought leadership" which may challenge Atlas](https://fathom.video/share/uhQ45cf8hr_JN_veN8NGAi72WvG4B6x1?tab=summary&timestamp=3810.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Experiment with creating outlines externally before using Atlas](https://fathom.video/share/uhQ45cf8hr_JN_veN8NGAi72WvG4B6x1?tab=summary&timestamp=1465.0)
  - [Focus on editing/condensing Atlas outputs rather than rewriting](https://fathom.video/share/uhQ45cf8hr_JN_veN8NGAi72WvG4B6x1?tab=summary&timestamp=2429.0)
  - [Aim for \~2500 word articles by deleting unnecessary sections](https://fathom.video/share/uhQ45cf8hr_JN_veN8NGAi72WvG4B6x1?tab=summary&timestamp=2897.0)
  - [Follow up with Cody on approved topics and notes](https://fathom.video/share/uhQ45cf8hr_JN_veN8NGAi72WvG4B6x1?tab=summary&timestamp=3740.0)
  - [Create improvement tickets for Atlas when outputs are unsatisfactory](https://fathom.video/share/uhQ45cf8hr_JN_veN8NGAi72WvG4B6x1?tab=summary&timestamp=3634.0)
